title: Judges back AI for efficiency, but warn against ‘robo justice’ without safeguards
description: Even as courts turn to technology to ease backlog and improve decisions, High Court judges on Sunday said artificial intelligence (AI) could significantly aid justice delivery, but human judgment could remain central.
content:

title: Artificial Intelligence: Revolutionizing Every Aspect of Life - Shekhar Kapur Unveils 'Masoom: The Next Generation' and Talks AI at IFFD 2026
description: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is rapidly redefining the way we live, work, and interact. No longer confined to the realm of science fiction, AI is now a driving force behind innovations across all sectors— from healthcare and finance to entertainment and manufacturing.
